case_title: ROCHEDA FAIRCHILD VS. DOLMA YANGZOM ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAIRCHILD, ROCHEDA AS TO DEFENDANT MONLAM, ALAK
